compiled_state.title: Migrate pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh to shared merge-state.sh library (inline MERGE_HEAD detection)
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh sources merge-state.sh: Verify: grep -q 'source.*merge-state.sh' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh
- [ ] No inline MERGE_HEAD detection in executable lines: Verify: { grep -v '^\s*#' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh | grep -qE 'rev-parse --git-dir.*MERGE_HEAD'; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT: Migration complete. 
- Sourced merge-state.sh in pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh (line 50)
- Replaced inline MERGE_HEAD detection with ms_is_merge_in_progress() call (line 65)
- Updated test_merge_commit_exempt in test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh to use a fake SHA (not HEAD) so ms_is_merge_in_progress's MERGE_HEAD==HEAD guard does not reject the test case
- All 12 tests pass (PASSED: 12, FAILED: 0)
- Both AC checks green
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: completed as part of batch 5
comments.author: Test
